word: G3819 - πάλαι - pálai - pal'-ahee - Any while

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πάλαι

- Transliteration: Palai

- Phonetic: pal'-ahee

- Definition:

1. of old, former

2. long ago

- Origin: probably another form for G3825 (through the idea of retrocession)

- TDNT entry: 16:57,8

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Probably another form for G3825 (through the idea of retrocession); (adverbially) formerly or (relatively) sometime since; (elliptically as adjective) ancient: - any while a great while ago (of) old in time past.
